name: MediaSetPropertyRatio
title: MediaSetPropertyRatio
syntax: long MediaSetPropertyRatio(dword objHandle, char propertyName[], dword numerator, dword denominator);
description: Sets a ratio as a 64-bit property value. Properties can be set on an object specific basis for a media type object (e.g. returned by MediaGetMediaType).

parameters.name: propertyName
parameters.description: Name of the property to be set.
